Ikhtisar Kinerja Efek Lainnya Other Securities Performance Highlights Tingkat Suku Bunga/ Jumlah Imbalan Peringkat Status Tanggal Tanggal Jatuh ( juta Rupiah) Ijarah Nama Efek Terakhir Pembayaran Penerbitan Tempo Amount Security Name Interest Latest Payment Issuance Date Maturity Date (million Rate/Ijarah Rating Status Rupiah) Return (%) Obligasi Berkelanjutan I Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tahap I Tahun 2024 4 Juli 2024 14 Juli 2025 idAAA Belum Lunas 240.225 6,5 Sustainable Bond I July 4, 2024 July 14, 2025 (Triple A) Not Paid off Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Phase I Year 2024 Sukuk Ijarah Berkelanjutan I Dayamitra Telekomunikasi idAAA(sy) Tahap I Tahun 2024 4 Juli 2024 14 Juli 2025 Belum Lunas 10.015 6,5 (Triple A Sustainable Sukuk Ijarah I July 4, 2024 July 14, 2025 Not Paid off Syariah) Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Phase I Year 2024 PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk 2024 Annual Report 13 Kilas Kinerja Performance Overview Peristiwa Penting Event Highlights 1 Februari / February 2024 Bursa Efek Indonesia mengumumkan bahwa Perseroan resmi menjadi konstituen indeks LQ45 per 1 Februari 2024. Indeks LQ45 dikenal bergengsi karena merupakan merepresentasikan 45 saham emiten terbaik di Bursa Efek Indonesia, yang dipilih berdasarkan likuiditas tinggi, kapitalisasi pasar terbesar, serta memenuhi sejumlah kriteria lainnya. Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) announced that the Company officially became a constituent of LQ45 index as of February 1, 2024. LQ45 index is prestigious as it represents the 45 best-listed companies on IDX, selected based on high liquidity, largest market capitalization, and other key criteria. 29 Februari / February 2024 Perseroan meraih penghargaan di BAZNAS Award 2024 sebagai Perusahaan Pembayar Zakat Terbaik dari Badan Amil Zakat Nasional. Penghargaan ini diberikan kepada Mitratel atas kontribusi besar dalam pembayaran zakat, infak, sedekah yang merata di seluruh Indonesia. The Company received an award at BAZNAS Award 2024 as the Best Zakat Paying Company from National Amil Zakat Agency (BAZNAS). This award was given to Mitratel for its significant contributions in zakat, infaq, and sadaqah payments, which are distributed evenly across Indonesia.

evidence.shareholders: SHAREHOLDERS, % Telkom Indonesia Tbk 71.83% Net profit increased 0.6% YoY to IDR 2.1 trillion, with a net profit margin of 22.2%. This robust PT Maleo Investasi 5.98% performance highlights the effectiveness of MTEL’s strategy in strengthening its core segments while GIC Pte Ltd 5.33% sustaining high profitability amid ongoing MNO industry consolidation. Treasury Stock 2.42% Public 14.44% Operational Performance In FY25, MTEL recorded solid operational performance, supported by fiber expansion which grew PRICE VS. JCI 12.1% YoY to 57,199 km and tower growth of 2.1% YoY to 40,230 units, maintaining its position as the largest TowerCo in Southeast Asia. The number of tenants increased by 5.4% YoY to 63,084, while colocation grew 11.7% YoY to 22,854, with 71% of new colocation deployed outside Java, in line with MTEL’s geographical diversification strategy. Regional distribution highlighted strong momentum in ex-Java, with the highest percentage growth in tenants seen in Sumatera (8.3%), followed by Maluku & Papua (6.2%), Sulawesi (6.0%), and Kalimantan (5.8%). The overall tenancy ratio improved to 1.57x from 1.52x in the prior year, with 59% of MTEL’s tower portfolio now located in ex-Java, capturing growth from operators’ expansion beyond Java. This achievement reinforces MTEL position as an integrated telecommunications infrastructure provider and Next-Gen Tower Provider with a sustainable growth foundation, amid the rising demand for digital services nationwide. Source: PSI Research, Bloomberg Outlook We maintain a constructive outlook on Indonesia’s telecommunications tower sector heading into KEY FINANCIALS FY26, with industry revenue projected to grow modestly at ~1.2% YoY, underpinned by post-MNO IDR bn FY24 FY25 FY26F FY27F consolidation dynamics, recent spectrum allocations (700 MHz and 2.6 GHz), and continued operator Revenue 9,308 9,534 9,867 10,141 focus on cost efficiency, network integration, and infrastructure sharing. Structural demand remains 4,801 4,806 4,973 5,112 Gross Profit intact, driven by ongoing 5G rollout and network densification, particularly in urban and high-traffic EBITDA 5,625 6,675 6,417 6,626 areas, while emerging technologies, including green infrastructure, IoT, AI-driven networks, and edge computing are expected to provide incremental upside to both tower and fiber deployment. Net Profit 2,108 2,119 2,354 2,444 EPS 26 26 29 30 Additionally, government-led initiatives such as Internet Rakyat (IRA) and Fixed Wireless Access 3.6 3.6 3.8 3.8 (FWA) leveraging the 1.4 GHz spectrum introduce new avenues for broadband expansion, particularly ROA (%) in underserved regions. Against this backdrop, MTEL is well-positioned to capture growth through PER (x) 25.6 26.9 23.3 22.5 disciplined capital allocation and operational efficiency, despite prevailing macro headwinds PBV (x) 1.6 1.7 1.6 1.5 including geopolitical uncertainty, Fed rate trajectory, and oil price volatility. evidence.AWAL._20pdf_financial: income statement, notes, other reports, and statements of changes in financial position that can be presented in various ways, such as cash flow statements or fund flow statements and other statements. This final project relies on secondary data obtained from the financial statements of PT and the audited and published annual financial statements of PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi. Both the official PT website and the Indonesia Stock Exchange (IDX) website, accessible at www.idx.co.id, provide access to these data sources. PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk's annual report can be viewed at www.mitratel.co.id. Mitratel, whose full name is PT Dayamitra Telekomunikasi TBK, generated a net profit of 2.01 trillion Indonesian Rupiah in 2023. This net profit was IDR 1.78 trillion last year, up 12.5% from the previous year. Financial statements serve as a communication tool between people with an interest in a company's financial data or operations and those parties, as they provide an overview of financial operations and are the final product of accounting activities. Keywords: Financial statements, financial report analysis viii PRAKATA Puji dan syukur kehadirat Tuhan Yang Maha Esa atas limpahan berkat, rahmat-Nya, petunjuk-Nya, dan karunia-Nya yang tak terhingga, juga memberikan kelancaran sehingga penulis bisa menyelesaikan tugas akhir yang berjudul “Prosedur Penyusunan Laporan dan Kinerja Keuangan Pada PT. Dayamitra Telekomunikasi Tbk” dengan lancar dan tepat waktu. Dalam kesempatan ini, penulis menyadari dan mengucapkan terima kasih kepada semua pihak yang telah ikut serta dalam membantu, memberikan dukungan, dan bimbingan dalam menyelesaikan laporan tugas akhir ini, terutama kepada Masripah, SE.,M.S.Ak.,CPSAK selaku ketua program studi D3 Akuntansi UPNVJ, serta Agus Maulana, S.Pd., M.S.Ak selaku dosen pembimbing yang telah membantu dan membimbing penulis dalam menyusun laporan Praktik Kerja Lapangan ini hingga selesai. Ucapan terima kasih kepada kedua orang tua saya yaitu Bapak Erna Setriana dan Ibu Endah Suwendah. Kaka saya M Taufik Iqbal dan Nenek saya Yetty O Komar yang telah memberikan doa serta dukungan selama menjalani masa perkuliahan kepada penulis. Ucapan terima kasih juga disampaikan kepada sahabat saya Olivia Tahira Shalshabila yang telah sabar mendengarkan segala keluh kesah penulis serta teman-teman yang telah membantu dalam penulisan ini. Semoga Laporan Tugas Akhir ini bermanfaat Jakarta, 8 April 2024 (Annissa Nur Ernandah) ix DAFTAR ISI HALAMAN SAMPUL
